name: Herb and Wheat Cloverleaf Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups flour, wheat germ, sugar, undissolved yeast, Fines Herbes, salt, and onion powder.
2. Heat the water, milk, and butter until very warm (120°F to 130°F). Stir into the dry ingredients.
3. Stir in 1 egg and enough remaining flour to make a soft dough. Knead on lightly floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 4 to 6 minutes.
4. Cover; let rest on floured surface for 10 minutes.
5. Divide the dough into 18 equal pieces. Divide each again into 3 equal pieces, forming smooth balls.
6. Place 3 balls in each section of an 18-greased 2 1/2-inch muffin pan cups.
7. Cover; let rise in a warm, draft-free place until doubled in size, about 30 to 45 minutes.
8. Beat the remaining egg with 1 tablespoon water and brush on rolls.
9. Bake at 400°F for 12 to 15 minutes or until done. Remove from muffin cups; let cool on wire racks.
Or use 1/2 teaspoon each: SPICE ISLANDS Thyme (leaves), Oregano (leaves), Sweet Basil, and Marjoram.
